days.text: Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. A few thunderstorms later. Force 2 to 3 east to southeasterly winds with gusts, becoming northeasterlies.
Cloudy. Showers. Possible thunderstorms at first. Force 3 to 5 east to northeasterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers at first. Force 3 to 4 easterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 2 to 3 east to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 2 to 4 southerly winds.
